4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","security-audit-remediation-2026-04-08",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","security-audit-remediation-2026-04-08","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/0lwc_c3gi079n.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/0ksik4y4kc29~.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0r9teku~hyhf~.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0q43xsqp3a164.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0n9h-gmzgvi2b.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/14rr90i2d-.pv.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ck-ohyatz.r4.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/00-csyj9a6t-x.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i341nvd7v18~.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/08b4.saoubi96.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-8",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0w8l2a9eo_~bf.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable It is intentionally narrow: only issues confirmed against the current repository were patched as code. Items that require a larger governance or cryptographic migration remain documented rather than overstated."]}]}],["$","$1","block-3",{"children":["$","h2","h2-17",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold The program still preserves support for both token programs."]}]]}]}]

33:["$","$1","block-18",{"children":["$","h3","h3-151",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":["Zk-Enforced Verifier Program Boundary"]}]}]
34:["$","$1","block-19",{"children":["$","ul","l-161",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-161-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":["Reported issue: a ",["$","code","l-161-0-code-0",{"className":"rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-black/28 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-[0.92em] text-cyan-100","children":"zk_enforced"}]," receipt could be stored without any verifier program boundary, making the mode look stronger than the evidence attached to it."]}],["$","li","l-161-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":["Fix: ",["$","code","l-161-1-code-0",{"className":"rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-black/28 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-[0.92em] text-cyan-100","children":"zk_enforced"}]," receipts now require ",["$","code","l-161-1-code-1",{"className":"rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-black/28 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-[0.92em] text-cyan-100","children":"verifier_program: Some(pubkey)"}],", and receipt validation rejects ",["$","code","l-161-1-code-2",{"className":"rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-black/28 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-[0.92em] text-cyan-100","children":"zk_enforced"}]," receipts that do not carry that boundary."]}]]}]}]
35:["$","$1","block-20",{"children":["$","h2","h2-168",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":["Reviewed But Not Claimed As Fully Solved"]}]}]
36:["$","$1","block-21",{"children":["$","h3","h3-177",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":["Quorum Semantics"]}]}]
37:["$","$1","block-22",{"children":["$","p","p-182",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["PrivateDAO currently defines quorum as a reveal-participation threshold over committed votes. That is a product/governance design choice, not silently changed in this patch because changing it would reinterpret existing proposals. Stronger denominator snapshots remain a separate policy/versioning path."]}]}]
38:["$","$1","block-23",{"children":["$","h3","h3-190",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":["ZK Verification Claims"]}]}]
39:["$","$1","block-24",{"children":["$","p","p-195",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["The strict V2 path already distinguishes threshold-attested evidence from true cryptographic verifier CPI. This patch does not claim a new verifier CPI integration. The current security posture remains: threshold attestation is operational enforcement; true cryptographic verification requires a verifier program/source-verifiable receipt path."]}]}]
